title: How to Edit AI Content in GoHighLevel — Brand Voice Control
description: Learn to edit AI content in GoHighLevel while maintaining brand voice. Master Ask AI's conversational editing for faster, smarter content refinement.
html_content:
If you're running a digital marketing agency, you know the pain: AI-generated content saves time, but it rarely sounds like YOUR brand. You spend hours manually rewriting copy, adjusting tone, and fine-tuning messaging to match your voice. What if you didn't have to?

GoHighLevel's Ask AI conversational editing feature solves this exact problem. Instead of regenerating content from scratch or manually rewriting paragraphs, you can chat with AI in natural language to refine, rewrite, and adapt generated text while keeping your brand voice intact. It's like having a co-writer who understands your brand and responds to quick edits in real time.

In this guide, you'll discover how to use GoHighLevel's conversational AI editing to maintain brand consistency, save hours on content refinement, and deliver polished copy to clients faster. And to get hands-on experience, try GoHighLevel free for 30 days — double the standard trial.

📋 In This Guide

  • What is Conversational Editing with Ask AI?
  • Why Brand Voice Matters in AI-Generated Content
  • How to Edit AI Content Using Natural Language Commands
  • Preserving Your Brand Voice While Refining Text
  • Leveraging Smart Session Memory for Consistent Workflows
  • Real-World Examples: Editing Copy Across Content Types

What is Conversational Editing with Ask AI?

Conversational editing with Ask AI is a game-changing feature in GoHighLevel that lets you refine AI-generated content through natural language prompts, not traditional editing tools. Instead of rewriting text manually or regenerating entire pieces, you can ask AI to make specific changes in a chat-style interface.

Here's what makes it different from standard content generation:

  • Natural Language Commands: You don't need technical syntax. Simply type requests like "Make this more casual" or "Add urgency to this headline" and AI adjusts the text instantly.
  • Real-Time Preview: See changes before you accept them. If the edit doesn't match your vision, ask for adjustments without starting over.
  • Iterative Refinement: Build on previous edits. Ask AI to "tighten that up further" or "add more details" and it remembers the context.
  • No Page Reload: Stay in your funnel builder, email editor, or social planner while making edits. The conversational interface lives right there alongside your content.

The result? You go from spending 30 minutes manually rewriting a sales page to spending 5 minutes chatting with AI to get exactly what you need.

Why Brand Voice Matters in AI-Generated Content

Here's the reality: Generic AI content doesn't convert. Your brand has a unique voice—your tone, vocabulary, values, and personality. When prospects read your copy, they should feel like they're hearing from YOU, not a robot.

Without brand voice control, you get:

  • Copy that sounds stiff, overly formal, or impersonal
  • Messaging misaligned with your agency's values or positioning
  • Inconsistent tone across emails, landing pages, and social posts
  • Client frustration (especially in agencies managing multiple brands)
  • Lower engagement and conversion rates

That's why GoHighLevel's conversational editing puts YOU in control. You define the voice, the AI adapts to it, and every piece of generated content stays aligned with your brand.

How to Edit AI Content Using Natural Language Commands

Here's the step-by-step process to edit AI-generated content in GoHighLevel using Ask AI:

Step 1: Generate Initial Content

First, generate your AI content as you normally would. Use GoHighLevel's Content AI feature to create a headline, email body, social post, or landing page copy. The initial output doesn't have to be perfect—it's just your starting point.

Step 2: Open the Ask AI Editor

Once your content is generated, look for the "Edit with Ask AI" button. This opens a chat-style interface on the right side of your screen, keeping you in the same workspace.

Step 3: Make Your First Edit Request

Type a natural language command. Examples:

  • "Make this sound more friendly and conversational"
  • "Add a pain point about budget constraints"
  • "Rewrite the first sentence to grab attention better"
  • "Shorten this to 50 words max"
  • "Use words that appeal to solopreneurs, not enterprises"

Step 4: Review the Preview

Ask AI generates a revised version instantly. You'll see the updated text in a preview box. Read it. Does it match your vision? If not, ask for another adjustment.

Step 5: Accept or Refine

If you like it, click "Accept" and the edit is applied to your original content. If not, ask for further refinement. You can make unlimited edits until it's exactly what you want.

💡 Pro Tip

Be specific in your edit requests. Instead of "Make it better," say "Add a 3-step process and make each step actionable." Specific prompts = better results.

Preserving Your Brand Voice While Refining Text

The key to maintaining brand voice in AI editing is training the AI on what your brand sounds like. Here's how:

1. Set Voice Guidelines Upfront

Before you start editing, establish your brand voice parameters. Are you casual or professional? Data-driven or story-driven? Technical or simplified? Tell Ask AI explicitly:

  • "Our brand is professional but approachable. We use short sentences and avoid jargon."
  • "We're a growth hacking agency. We're bold, direct, and metrics-focused."
  • "We serve coaches and consultants. Use warm, empowering language."

2. Reference Past Successful Copy

During editing, reference existing pieces that nailed your voice: "Make this sound like the email we sent last week about client results." Ask AI will pick up on the tone and replicate it.

3. Iterative Voice Refinement

If the first edit doesn't quite match your voice, don't accept it. Ask for adjustments: "That's closer, but less enthusiastic. Add more energy." Keep refining until it sounds authentically you.

4. Use Consistent Terminology

Protect your unique language. If you always say "client success" instead of "customer satisfaction," tell Ask AI: "Use 'client success' instead of 'customer satisfaction' throughout."

Leveraging Smart Session Memory for Consistent Workflows

One of the most powerful features in Ask AI is session memory. This means the AI remembers context from earlier edits in the same session and applies that learning to future requests.

How this saves time:

  • First Edit: You establish tone with "Make this casual and conversational." AI learns your preference.
  • Second Edit: You don't need to repeat yourself. Ask AI to "tighten the messaging" and it automatically applies the casual tone you already defined.
  • Multiple Pieces: If you're editing 5 emails in one session, Ask AI carries your voice preferences through all of them.
  • Consistency Across Channels: Edit content for email, then move to social media. Ask AI maintains the same brand voice because it remembers what you established earlier.

This is a game-changer for agencies managing multiple client campaigns. You set the voice once per client, then edit all their content with that voice already locked in.

Real-World Examples: Editing Copy Across Content Types

Example 1: Email Subject Line

Generated: "Maximize Your Revenue Stream with Advanced Analytics Solutions"

Your Edit Request: "This is too formal. Make it intriguing and curiosity-driven for B2B SaaS founders."

Ask AI Result: "The #1 metric most founders ignore (and how it kills growth)"

Example 2: Landing Page Headline

Generated: "We Help Businesses Improve Their Marketing Efficiency"

Your Edit Request: "Make this benefit-driven and specific to agencies. Use the word 'scale' and remove 'improve.'"

Ask AI Result: "Scale Your Agency Without Scaling Your Workload"

Example 3: Social Media Caption

Generated: "Our latest case study shows a 250% increase in conversions using our platform."

Your Edit Request: "Add a hook that makes people stop scrolling. Make it more personal and less corporate."

Ask AI Result: "One client went from 'I don't know how we'll scale this' to hitting 250% more conversions. Here's exactly what changed..."

Each of these edits took 30 seconds and required zero manual rewriting. That's the power of conversational editing.
